items.q: Who do I contact if I have a problem?
items.a: For academic issues, contact your faculty coordinator. For general student welfare, the Student Affairs Office (Admin Building, Room 12) is available Mon-Fri, 9 AM - 4 PM. Emergency campus security: extension 555.

items.q: How do I join a club or society?
items.a: Visit the Club Fair during Orientation Week Day 3, or browse and sign up anytime through the 'Student Life' section of the portal.
Yes, the Student Wellness Centre (Admin Building, Room 8) offers free confidential counseling — book a slot through the portal or walk in during office hours.
